Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class QueueRoutingConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.QueueRoutingConfig
public class QueueRoutingConfig extends Metadata

Java class for QueueRoutingConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="QueueRoutingConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="capacityPercentage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="capacityWeight" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dropAdditionalSkillsTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isAttributeBased" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="pushTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="queueOverflowAssignee" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="routingModel" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}RoutingModel"/>
         <element name="routingPriority" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="skills" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}QueueRoutingConfigSkill" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="userOverflowAssignee" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getSkills

      public List<QueueRoutingConfigSkill> getSkills()
      Gets the value of the skills property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the skills property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getSkills().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list QueueRoutingConfigSkill

      Returns:
      The value of the skills property.

    • getUserOverflowAssignee
